title: Adaptive planning from scenarios to strategic actions
use_when: Adaptive planning from scenarios to strategic actions. Use when the user needs a product workflow for product strategy related to adaptive planning from scenarios to strategic actions. Trigger terms: strategic-planning, facilitation, product-management, decision-making, frameworks.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Adaptive planning from scenarios to strategic actions when the request is mainly a different lifecycle artifact; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Adaptive planning from scenarios to strategic actions strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move
framework_fit: Adaptive planning from scenarios to strategic actions fits Strategy work in the Strategize lifecycle when the user needs Adaptive planning from scenarios to strategic actions strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces Adaptive planning from scenarios to strategic actions strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move without tying recommendations to the user's Strategize stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Adaptive planning from scenarios to strategic actions as generic Strategy advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Adaptive planning from scenarios to strategic actions when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $adaptive-planning-from-scenarios-to-strategic-actions to turn this adaptive context into a decision-ready Adaptive planning from scenarios to strategic actions strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move.
examples.expected_artifact: Adaptive planning from scenarios to strategic actions strategy memo with choices, tradeoffs, risks, and recommended next move
